title: habenaria panigrahiana var. parviloba
intro: Habenaria panigrahiana var. parviloba, a variant of the orchid species, is a plant that belongs to the genus Habenaria. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to be consumed for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
